query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_device_inventory_current AS
SELECT
    d.id                AS device_id,
    d.display_name,
    d.default_name,
    d.custom_name,
    d.macaddr,
    d.ipaddr4,
    d.ipaddr6,
    d.device_class,
    d.vendor,
    d.role,
    d.auto_role,
    d.analysis,
    d.analysis_level,
    d.is_l3,
    d.vlanid,
    d.on_watchlist,
    d.critical,
    d.dns_name,
    d.dhcp_name,
    d.netbios_name,
    d.cdp_name,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(d.discover_time  / 1000) AS discover_datetime,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(d.last_seen_time / 1000) AS last_seen_datetime,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(d.mod_time       / 1000) AS mod_datetime,
    d.raw_id,
    d.polled_at
FROM dim_device d;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_device_ip_current AS
SELECT
    s.device_id,
    d.display_name,
    s.ipaddr,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(s.last_observation_time / 1000) AS last_observed_datetime,
    s.raw_id,
    s.polled_at
FROM snap_device_ipaddr s
JOIN dim_device d ON d.id = s.device_id
WHERE s.is_current = TRUE;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_device_dns_current AS
SELECT
    s.device_id,
    d.display_name,
    s.dns_name,
    s.raw_id,
    s.polled_at
FROM snap_device_dnsname s
JOIN dim_device d ON d.id = s.device_id
WHERE s.is_current = TRUE;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_alert_assignments_current AS
SELECT
    a.id            AS alert_id,
    a.name,
    a.type,
    a.severity,
    a.disabled,
    a.stat_name,
    a.field_name,
    a.operator,
    a.operand,
    a.units,
    a.interval_length,
    a.refire_interval,
    a.apply_all,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge_alert_device      bd WHERE bd.alert_id = a.id) AS device_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge_alert_device_group bg WHERE bg.alert_id = a.id) AS group_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge_alert_application  ba WHERE ba.alert_id = a.id) AS app_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge_alert_network      bn WHERE bn.alert_id = a.id) AS network_count,
    a.raw_id,
    a.polled_at
FROM dim_alert a;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_metric_latest_by_object AS
SELECT
    mr.metric_category,
    mr.object_type,
    ms.oid,
    ms.stat_time,
    ms.duration,
    ms.values_json,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(ms.stat_time / 1000) AS stat_datetime,
    mr.raw_id,
    mr.polled_at
FROM fact_metric_stat ms
JOIN fact_metric_response mr ON mr.id = ms.metric_response_id
WHERE ms.stat_time = (
    SELECT MAX(ms2.stat_time)
    FROM fact_metric_stat ms2
    JOIN fact_metric_response mr2 ON mr2.id = ms2.metric_response_id
    WHERE mr2.metric_category = mr.metric_category
      AND ms2.oid = ms.oid
);

    mr.metric_category,
